text: Natural language processing, or NLP, is a field of artificial intelligence that helps computers understand human language. It goes beyond simply reading words; it focuses on text understanding, enabling machines to grasp meaning and context. For example, NLP powers online translation tools that can convert a paragraph from English to Spanish instantly. It is also used in sentiment analysis, where companies analyze customer reviews to determine if the feedback is positive, negative, or neutral. Additionally, chatbots rely on NLP to have natural conversations with users, answering questions and providing support. From translating languages to understanding emotions, NLP is changing how we interact with technology every day.
